caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT AT WORK" sits in front of a professional microphone. He is positioned in a room with various framed pictures on the wall and a white mannequin dressed in a white shirt in the background. A clothing rack is visible behind him. On the bottom left and right of the screen, logos for "ON THE RECORD" and "REALLY TOT" are displayed. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, shifting his facial expression and slightly moving his head. In the first frame, he has his mouth open and is gesturing with his hand near his chest. By the final frame, he has shifted his gaze slightly and his mouth is closed as he continues to talk.
